description: 175 - 07-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Jon Garvie (former Chief of Staff to the Foreign Secretary, FCDO)

participants.name: Emails between Peter Mandelson and Jon Garvie
participants.role: former Chief of Staff to the Foreign Secretary

text:
Staff to the Foreign Secretary, FCDO)

From: Jon Garviel Personal
Sent: Mon 07/04/2025 12:16:29 PM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson[ Personal ]
Subject: RE: Letter from America to David

OFFICIAL

Sorry | meant what other instances do you see of where we're operating outside of
what we should recognise as our core interests? | assumed there were some...

OFFICIAL
From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: 07 April 2025 12:48
To: Jon Garvie
Subject: Re: Letter from America to David
OFFICIAL
Explain more ?
Get Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL
From: Jon Garvie < Personal >
Sent: Monday, April 7, 2025 7:41:24 AM
To: Peter Mandelson < Personal >
Subject: RE: Letter from America to David
OFFICIAL

Thanks, v useful to see. Pls keep sending if you can.
More specific instances of where we're focusing / distracting attention outside of our
core interests?

OFFICIAL
From: Peter Mandelson < Personal >
Sent: 05 April 2025 14:50
To: Jon Garvie Personal

Subject: Letter from America to David

OFFICIAL
KK

514

Very best
Peter
Lord Mandelson
HM Ambassador, Washington DC
| 
OFFICIAL
Personal
Personal
***
515
